summary: Session 2: Prerequisite UX shipped per D3 — deriveBlockedByPrereqs now carries the full unsatisfied list (new UnsatisfiedPrerequisite type: slug + condition + targetState, 'unknown' for unresolvable slugs) on SessionSet.unsatisfiedPrereqs, with blockedByPrereqs kept as the compatibility boolean (== list non-empty); the [BLOCKED BY PREREQS] description badge is retired in favor of a quiet chain marker (U+26D3+FE0E) next to the row name whose tooltip names each unsatisfied prerequisite and its current state (Set 050 asterisk pattern: SessionSetsModel blockedMarker/blockedTooltip, RowPayload.blockedMarker/blockedTooltip, client.js blockedSpan, tree.css .row-blocked-marker); terminal-state suppression unchanged. New right-click action dabblerSessionSets.openPrerequisiteSpec on blocked non-terminal rows (direct open / QuickPick when several / info message for unknown slugs), registered in openFile.ts + package.json + ActionRegistry (16 actions). Docs: README 'Prerequisites and the blocked marker' section (routed gemini-pro draft; auto-verify QuickPick gap folded in) + session-state-schema.md Prerequisites/Bucketing reconciliation + pointer paragraph. Tests: unsatisfied-list derivation matrix incl. cross-root readAllSessionSets resolution, marker/tooltip suite, badge-retired source scan, openPrerequisiteSpec applicability matrix; Playwright blocked-by-prereqs.spec.ts rewritten badge->marker. TS 730 pass + 2 pre-existing Set-026 failures; tsc + esbuild clean; Python 1185 pass / 1 skip. Verification: R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major: alleged 17-vs-16 test inconsistency) DISPROVEN empirically (scripted count = 16; test + suite re-run green); R2 gpt-5-4 accepted the disposition: VERIFIED.

reason.specifics: Per the routed ai-assignment analysis (gemini-pro), Session 3 introduces a new command plus a precise spec.md rewrite helper that must preserve all other content byte-for-byte, warranting the same Anthropic orchestrator at maximum effort.
